name: genexus_whoami
description: Return current KB context, GeneXus install, and MCP version.

name: genexus_query
description: Search objects. Prefixes: usedby:, type:, description:, parent:, parentPath:. Triggers KB index build on first call against a fresh install — _meta.partial=true means more results will appear as indexing continues (watch notifications/progress). Literal-name queries skip the index via direct SDK lookup. genexus_read / genexus_edit / genexus_list_objects / genexus_lifecycle are index-independent and always return immediately.

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. When >0, response includes inline_reads array with full content of the top N matches. Capped at 3.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_list_objects
description: List objects with pagination. Feed nextOffset until hasMore=false. Returns minimal shape by default (name, type, path, parent); verbose=true for full shape.

verbose.description: When true, returns full item shape (default false).

inline_read_top.description: 0-3. When >0, response includes inline_reads array with full content of the top N matches. Capped at 3.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_read
description: Read source/metadata parts. name or targets (mutually exclusive). Paginate with offset/limit. Use parts=["Source","Variables",...] to select specific parts and skip the rest.

parts.description: When set, only the listed parts are returned in a combined response. Mutually exclusive with part/offset/limit.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_edit
description: Edit source/metadata. name or targets (mutually exclusive). Use dryRun=true with mode=patch first. Returns post_state.diff (unified diff) by default; verbose=true adds slices (±15 lines); return_post_state=false opts out.

return_post_state.description: Set false to omit post_state.diff from the response (default true).

verbose.description: When true, adds slices (±15 lines around each hunk) to post_state (default false).

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_inspect
description: Snapshot of an object: metadata, variables, structure, signature.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_analyze
description: Semantic analysis: impact, dependencies, complexity, naming, summary, explain.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_inject_context
description: Inject SDT structures and Procedure signatures of called objects.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_lifecycle
description: Build/validate/index/poll. action=build is non-blocking when estimated_seconds>=20 — returns {job_id, status:running} and surfaces _meta.background_jobs on the next call. action=status accepts taskId OR job_id via target; wait_seconds>0 long-polls up to 25s.

target.description: Object name(s), taskId, job_id, or op:<operationId>.

estimated_seconds.description: Build: <20 forces sync fast-path (one turn); >=20 (default 60) goes async.

wait_seconds.description: Status: 0-25. >0 long-polls server-side until terminal or timeout.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_forge
description: Generate new code or structures from templates or translations.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_test
description: Execute native GeneXus tests (GXtest).

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_create_object
description: Create a new GeneXus object in the active KB.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_logs
description: Read worker_debug.log tail for error diagnosis or correlation.

name: genexus_worker_reload
description: Hot-reload worker: copy new binaries and respawn.

sourceDir.description: Absolute path to freshly built bin/Release.

name: genexus_delete_object
description: Delete an object from the KB. Irreversible — confirm=true required.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_export_object
description: Export a GeneXus object part to a text file on disk.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_import_object
description: Import a text file from disk into a GeneXus object part.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_refactor
description: Run GeneXus refactor: rename, extract procedure, or WWP condition set.

target.description: Primary object or symbol to refactor.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_add_variable
description: Add a variable to the Variables part of a GeneXus object.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_format
description: Format a GeneXus code snippet using worker rules.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_properties
description: Read or update GeneXus object properties.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_asset
description: Find, read, or write binary assets inside the active KB.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_history
description: List, read, save, or restore GeneXus object history snapshots.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_structure
description: Read or update visual and logical structure of GeneXus objects.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_layout
description: Native SDK layout/WebForm operations: get_tree, set_property, find_controls, inspect_surface, scan_mutators.

target.description: Object name alias for backward compatibility.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_doc
description: Generate structured docs (markdown, sequence diagrams, API contracts).

name: genexus_search_source
description: Regex/semantic search across Procedure/DataProvider/WebPanel/Transaction source.

argMatches.description: Positional arg index to expected literal text.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.

name: genexus_kb
description: Manage open KBs: list (with PID/RSS/idle), open (acquire Worker), close (release), set_default (persist alias to config.json).

alias.description: KB alias (for open/close). For open, auto-generated from path basename if omitted.

path.description: Absolute path to the KB (required for action=open if alias is not declared in config).

name: genexus_sql
description: SQL for a Transaction/Table (DDL) or a procedure For Each navigation.

kb.description: Target KB (alias or path). Required when 2+ KBs are open.
